name: Chandan Pandey
descp: 30+ years of experience across multiple IT operations, specializing in Business Intelligence and enterprise data strategy. Chandan brings first-hand expertise managing large onsite and offshore delivery teams across finance, healthcare, and manufacturing verticals. He has overseen multi-million-dollar BI transformation programs and led Iseyon Analytics from its founding to a practice of 125+ consultants serving global enterprises. A certified expert in Power BI, Databricks, and Snowflake architecture, Chandan is recognized for bridging the gap between data science and strategic business decision-making.
